name: umbra-protocol
description: Privacy-Preserving Enterprise Infrastructure for the Stellar Network

scripts.test: npm run test:sdk-audit && npm run test:sdk-escrow && npm run test:cross-module
scripts.test:e2e: cd clients/audit-sdk && npm run test:e2e && cd ../escrow-sdk && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test:rust && npm run test
scripts.install:all: cd clients/audit-sdk && npm install && cd ../escrow-sdk && npm install && cd ../../dashboard && npm install
